## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Webflow's developer documentation strategy and explore opportunities for improvement and expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Webflow's developer docs focus on extending Webflow functionality, not headless CMS use cases](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Designer API documentation needs significant improvement and expansion](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [New content ideas: framework-specific guides, MCP server examples, and a dedicated developer learning hub](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [Opportunity to create a separate developer-focused content area, similar to Webflow University but for developers](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=2047.0)

## Topics

### Current Developer Documentation Structure

  - [Separate APIs: Data API, Designer API, and Browser API](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Documentation includes introductory information, technical structure, and API references](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Guides section serves as a "kitchen sink" for use cases and examples](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Marketplace documentation covers app development and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)

### Developer Audience Segmentation

  - [App builders creating marketplace apps for monetization](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [In-house teams building custom integrations for specific company needs](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Front-end developers using custom code in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Developers creating custom integrations (e.g., syncing CMS data with Airtable)](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [App builders creating Webflow-specific apps or integrations (e.g., Make.com)](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)

### Documentation Performance Metrics

  - [Traffic and page views tracked in Amplitude and Snowflake](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [On-page feedback collected](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Conversion rates for guide pages (users implementing guide instructions)](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [API playground usage monitored](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Working towards "time to hello world" metric (from docs visit to successful API request)](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)

### Areas for Improvement

  - [Designer API documentation needs significant work](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Lack of framework-specific examples (e.g., React, Svelte, Vue)](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
  - [Limited guide content for Designer API](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Opportunity to expand MCP server documentation and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [Need for a showcase or code snippet library](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)

### Content Strategy Ideas

  - [Generate framework-specific versions of generic documentation](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Create a dedicated learning hub for developers (similar to Webflow University)](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=2047.0)
  - [Develop a "developer blog" for more general topics and case studies](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=2056.0)
  - [Improve SEO to capture developers researching CMS integration topics](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=2066.0)

### Inspiration from Competitors

  - [Canva's docs praised for organization and content quality](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [GSAP documentation noted for guidance and learning resources](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Figma's plugin API documentation structure similar to Webflow's](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vic to send a wishlist of desired documentation improvements](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=2259.0)
  - [Jason to create a map of current documentation and proposed additions/structure](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
  - [Develop a calibration article for docs-related content in the next two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=2239.0)
  - [Explore the creation of a separate developer-focused content area (e.g., /learn)](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=2047.0)
  - [Consider implementing developer stories and case studies in the new content area](https://fathom.video/share/xzEjusURiYSymGF17tCaNiJ94M2LRqWg?tab=summary&timestamp=2128.0)
